ranked_movies.title: Fight Club
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently recommended for its raw, angry critique of modern consumerist society and its portrayal of disillusioned, bitter characters.

ranked_movies.title: Taxi Driver
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently mentioned as a quintessential film about alienation, bitterness, and urban decay, fitting the request for angry and bitter tones.

ranked_movies.title: No Country for Old Men
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times for its bleak, unforgiving portrayal of a cruel world with no sugar-coating.

ranked_movies.title: There Will Be Blood
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted for its intense, bitter character study and exploration of greed and cruelty.

ranked_movies.title: Parasite
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its sharp social commentary on class inequality and the brutal realities of being a 'cog in the machine'.

ranked_movies.title: Falling Down
ranked_movies.reason: Specifically suggested as a film about an angry man lashing out at a cruel world, matching the requested tone perfectly.

ranked_movies.title: Oldboy
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned for its dark, vengeful, and brutal narrative that doesn't shy away from cruelty.

ranked_movies.title: Dredd
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its depiction of a miserable, violent urban hellscape where everyone is a cog in a machine.

ranked_movies.title: Naked
ranked_movies.reason: Directly suggested as the exact film for an angry and bitter tone, featuring some of the shittiest human beings imaginable.

ranked_movies.title: I Saw the Devil
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its intense, brutal, and vengeful storyline that exemplifies a cruel world.

ranked_movies.title: American History X
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned for its portrayal of bitter racism and the cycle of violence and hatred.

ranked_movies.title: Full Metal Jacket
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its bitter and angry depiction of the dehumanizing effects of war.

ranked_movies.title: Menace II Society
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested for its gritty, unforgiving look at urban violence and a cruel environment.

ranked_movies.title: Snowtown
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its depressing and brutal true-story portrayal of some of the worst human beings.

ranked_movies.title: Henry: Portrait of a Serial Killer
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned for its unflinching and disturbing look at a violent, bitter character.

ranked_movies.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested for its angry, bitter tone and characters fueled by rage and grief.

ranked_movies.title: Revolutionary Road
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its bitter depiction of suburban disillusionment and miserable characters.

ranked_movies.title: Aguirre, the Wrath of God
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned for its portrayal of madness and bitter ambition in a cruel, unforgiving environment.

ranked_movies.title: Sexy Beast
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested for its angry, volatile characters and gritty tone.

ranked_movies.title: Blazing Saddles
ranked_movies.reason: Included as a contrast; while a comedy, it was the most frequently mentioned 'funniest movie' and deals with bitter topics like racism through satire, showing up often in discussions.
